NAME CHANGE CALENDAR OF MAY-03-2016, NAME CHANGE CALENDAR - GRANTED PER WRITTEN DECREE. HEARING NOT REQUIRED. PROOF OF PUBLICATION IN THE CASE FILE. THE MINOR'S MOTHER, VAN THI THU HUYNH, AND FATHER, HUNG TAN DUONG, ARE PRESENT. IT APPEARS TO THE SATISFACTION OF THE COURT THAT ALL THE CONTENTIONS IN THE PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME OF THE MINOR ARE TRUE AND CORRECT, AND THAT THE PETITION SHOULD BE GRANTED. THE COURT GRANTS PETITIONERS' REQUEST TO CHANGE THE NAME OF THE MINOR FROM NHI YEN DUONG TO KELLY DUONG. DECREE CHANGING NAME OF THE MINOR IS SUBMITTED TO AND SIGNED BY THE COURT. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN. CLERK: MEREDITH GRIER. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (D514).
COPYING FEES (3 PAGE, 3 CERTIFIED COPY) PAID BY PETITIONER DUONG, HUNG TAN
